race.comment: Another race with a myriad of chances. SATIN DIVA (12) returns and maps for a good run if the fence is ok. Placed 2/2 fresh and did win only try heavy. Has the low draw and the claim and should be parked ready to explode. LOGAM (3) is a two-start galloper with plenty of upside. Just missed on debut then off the mark with an on-pace win last time. Promising type with the blinkers added and is expected to measure up again. CHISHOLM (10) is building a handy record and has come back in top order. Returned with a course and distance win and can only be fitter. Worth following up. NIGHTIME STAR (5) has raced in tougher grade at first two from a break. Blinkers added and worth another chance. MEISHO (4) was a course and distance winner last time and with the claim will be very competitive again.
